# Stimyouli Group - Full Company Profile & Context

## Overview
Stimyouli Group is a digital conglomerate based in Cairo, Egypt, providing a full suite of services for the modern digital landscape. Founded on the principle that "brilliant engineering meets compelling storytelling," the group manages multiple brands across hosting, SaaS, and creative services.

---

## Ecosystem & Brands

### 1. Stimyouli.com (Engineering & Growth Systems)
**Type**: Software Engineering Agency  
**Stack**: Next.js, React, Tailwind CSS, Node.js, Flask, PostgreSQL  
**Focus**:
- **High-Concurrency Systems**: Building for performance and scale.
- **Automation Systems**: Real-time business automation and data pipelines.
- **SEO-Optimized Architecture**: Performance-first frontend designs.

### 2. 1100.website & Jabalhost.com (Infrastructure Layer)
**Type**: Hosting & Cloud Infrastructure  
**Stack**: LiteSpeed, NVMe Storage, Linux Server Environments.
**Capabilities**:
- **99.9% Uptime Guarantee**: Professional-grade reliability.
- **Performance-First**: Focused on low-latency asset delivery.

### 3. Aklatix.cloud (SaaS Platform)
**Type**: Cloud POS & Business Management  
**Features**: Real-time inventory tracking, multi-device cloud operations.

### 4. Be3.click (Commerce Infrastructure)
**Status**: [Under Construction]  
**Type**: Marketplace & Digital Commerce systems.

---

## Strategic Partners

### Tryangleinc.com
**Type**: Corporate modernization and strategic engineering consultancy.
**Relationship**: Strategic ecosystem partner.

---

## Portfolio & Example Work

### Architecture & Engineering
- **Infinitylifts.sa**: Engineering portal for KSA/Egypt operations.
- **EUElevators.com**: European standard elevator solutions infrastructure.
- **Setaraegypt.com**: Industrial heritage and specialized engineering platform.
- **Elnileelevators.com**: Regional infrastructure and lifting systems.

### Digital Retail & Commerce
- **Noir-eg.com**: Premium lifestyle and jewelry e-commerce.
- **Stylishfurniture.shop**: High-end furniture and interior commerce.
- **Aklatix.cloud**: Cloud POS SaaS implementation.

### Enterprise & Business
- **Pencilplan.business**: Strategic business planning and architectural design.
- **Secretagencyegypt.com**: Boutique creative marketing and strategy.
- **Assih.com**: Corporate and professional services.
- **Esnad-om.com**: Logistics and support services infrastructure.
- **Purecite.ru**: Technology consulting and clean-code development.
- **Elsakr.company**: Logistics and conglomerate management.

### Specialized & Regional
- **El3asima.com**: New Capital real estate and investment architecture.
- **Map-eg.net**: Geospatial and regional data visualization.
- **Al-Hassany.net**: Specialized service and corporate platform.
- **Ozone-camp.com**: Experience design and community infrastructure.
- **Moodmakers.net**: Experimental digital media and atmosphere production.

---

- **Headquarters**: Cairo, Egypt
